records.title: KANUN TEKLİFLERİ İLE KOMİSYONLARDAN GELEN DİĞER İŞLER

fields.Subject: KANUN TEKLİFLERİ İLE KOMİSYONLARDAN GELEN DİĞER İŞLER

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.
Değerli milletvekilleri, tarih bize şunu defalarca gösterdi: Güçlü değilseniz haklı olmanız yetmez, sesiniz duyulmaz, sözünüz geçmez. Bedelini milletçe ödediğimiz acı tecrübeleri birlikte hatırlayalım: 1945 yılında bize sığınan Azerbaycan Türklerini Boraltan Köprüsü'nde kurşuna dizileceklerini bildiğimiz hâlde Ruslara teslim etmek zorunda kaldık. 59 Kerkük katliamında gücümüz sadece acı çekmeye yetti. 64'te bizi bir mektupla durdurmaya yeltendiler, sonrasında 74'te ambargo yedik. 75-84 yılları arasında ASALA tarafından dünyanın birçok yerinde 41 diplomatımız ve aileleri şehit edildi, engelleyemedik. 84-89 yıllarında Bulgaristan'daki Türkler zulme uğradı, acılarını paylaştık ama kaderlerini değiştiremedik. 92 Hocalı katliamında ağladık, aynı yıl Muavenet muhribimiz vuruldu, yandık. 92-95'de Bosna'da 200 bin insan öldü, Müslümanlar soykırıma uğradı, Kızılayı bile gönderemedik. İşte, zayıf ülke olmak, yoksul ülke olmak buydu, etrafımıza gölge düşüremiyorduk. Türkiye son yirmi yılda işte bu makus talihi değiştirme mücadelesi verdi, savunma sanayisinde devrim gerçekleştirdi çünkü savunma sanayi sadece teknolojik bir sıçrama değil milletin kendi kaderine yeniden hâkim olma mücadelesidir çünkü savunma sanayi tarihin bize kestiği faturaları yeniden ödememe kararlılığıdır. Bakın, dün neredeydik, bugün neredeyiz?
Kıbrıs Barış Harekâtı sonrasında ambargolar nedeniyle yedek parça, silah, mühimmat bulamazken bugün 185 ülkeye savunma sanayisi ürünü satan bir ülke hâline geldi. Kardak krizinde aciliyetten Zodyak botun parasını, benzin parasını cebinden ödeyen subaylarımız vardı, şimdi eş zamanlı 50 savaş gemisini yapabilen Avrupa'da tek ülke hâline geldik. Dağ komando tugaylarımız için keskin nişancı tüfeğini dahi Irak'taki kaçakçılardan alıyorduk, bugün Makine ve Kimya Endüstrisinin dünyada muadili olmayan akıllı mühimmatlar geliştirdiği bir Türkiye'ye geldik. Geçmişte askerimizin üzerine "US" yazan battaniye örtüyorduk, şimdi milletimizin huzur ve refahı için vatanımızın üzerine Çelik Kubbe örten Erdoğan Türkiyesine geldik. Nereden nereye? (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar) Terörle mücadelede 10 tane süper Kobra helikoptere mahkûm bir Türkiye'den bugün TUSAŞ'ta üretilen ve ihraç edilen yüzlerce ATAK helikopterine geldik. Yerli uçak üretme hayallerine kavuşamayan, maaşına haciz konulmuş şekilde vefat eden Vecihi Hürkuşlardan bugün KAAN uçağımıza koşan yüzlerce mühendisimize geldik. Atatürk "İstikbal göklerdedir." demişti, önceleri sadece göklere bakıyorduk; bugün göklerdeki KAAN, HÜRJET GÖKBEY, AKINCI ve KIZILELMA'ya bakıyoruz. On yılda 1.450 uçak, helikopter SİHA üretecek şahlanışı yaşıyoruz. Nereden nereye? Yıllarca Patriot vermemekle tehdit ettiler, ülkemizden çekip savunmasız bırakmak istediler; şimdi 7 bin dönüme Avrupa'nın en büyük hava savunma tesisini inşa ediyoruz.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Nereden nereye(!)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - SİHA, helikopter motorlarımız tamam, tank ve jet motorlarımızı tamamlıyoruz. ROKETSAN'la balıkları ürkütüyoruz(!) YILDIRIMHAN'ın 6 bin kilometrelik menziliyle Türkiye Cumhuriyeti devletinin boynu ve işlevini cümle âleme gösteriyoruz. İşte, muhtaç Türkiye'den bağımsız Türkiye'ye;
hesaba çekilenden hesaba alınan Türkiye'ye. Bir zamanlar hatırlayın, haritalarda bize çizgi çekiyorlardı, şimdi biz çizgimizi çekip sınırlarımızı öteden koruyoruz "Haddinizi bilin, cevabımız sert ve net olur." diyoruz; nereden nereye!
Atatürk'ün "Bağımsızlık benim karakterimdir." sözüyle çıktığımız bu yolda, bugün, KAAN'ın kanadında, Akıncı'nın gölgesinde, MİLGEM'in güvertesinde, Çelik Kubbe'nin radarında, Yıldırımhan'ın menzilinde işte o karakteri görüyoruz. Atatürk'ü rakı bardaklarına değil, füzelere ve uydulara yazmayı marifet sayıyoruz ve mavi gözlü adamın emperyalizme karşı mücadelesini devam ettiren uzun adamı, Cumhurbaşkanımız Sayın Recep Tayyip Erdoğan'ı saygıyla selamlıyoruz; Allah razı olsun diyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - Ben bu duygularla...
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Nereden nereye(!) Nereden nereye(!)
MEHMET BAYKAN (Konya) - Gel, gel, şöyle öne gel, öne gel; oradan olmuyor, duymuyoruz!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - Bundan rahatsız olmaya gerek yok, bundan rahatsız olmaya gerek yok; bunu alkışlamak gerekir, bununla gurur duymak gerekir.
BAŞKAN - Sayın Milletvekili, lütfen Genel Kurula hitap edin.
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - Ben bu duygularla yasamız hayırlı olsun diyorum, sözleşmeli erlerimizin kamuda istihdam hakları hayırlı olsun diyorum ve milletimiz, devletimiz var olsun diyorum.
Hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar; MHP sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear MPs, history has shown us this many times: If you are not strong, being right is not enough, your voice will not be heard, your say will not be heard. Let's remember together the painful experiences for which we paid the price as a nation: We had to hand over the Azerbaijani Turks who took refuge in us in 1945 to the Russians, even though we knew they would be shot at the Boraltan Bridge. 59 In the Kirkuk massacre, our strength was only enough to suffer. They tried to stop us with a letter in 64, then we were embargoed in 74. Between 75-84, 41 of our diplomats and their families were martyred by ASALA in many parts of the world, but we could not prevent it. Turks in Bulgaria were oppressed in 84-89, we shared their pain, but we could not change their fate. We cried during the Khojaly massacre in 1992. In the same year, our destroyer Muavenet was hit and burned. In 92-95, 200 thousand people died in Bosnia, Muslims suffered genocide, we could not even send the Red Crescent. This is what it means to be a weak country, a poor country, we could not cast a shadow on those around us. Turkey has struggled to change this bad fortune in the last twenty years, and has revolutionized the defense industry because the defense industry is not only a technological leap but also the nation's struggle to regain control of its own destiny, because the defense industry is the determination not to pay the bills that history has imposed on us again. Look, where were we yesterday, where are we today?
While Cyprus could not find spare parts, weapons and ammunition due to embargoes after the Peace Operation, today it has become a country that sells defense industry products to 185 countries. During the Kardak crisis, we had officers who paid for the Zodiac boat and gasoline out of their own pockets out of urgency, and now we have become the only country in Europe that can build 50 warships simultaneously. We were even purchasing sniper rifles for our mountain commando brigades from smugglers in Iraq. Today, we have come to a Türkiye where the Machinery and Chemical Industry has developed smart ammunition that has no equivalent in the world. In the past, we covered our soldiers with blankets with "US" written on them, but now we have come to Erdogan's Turkey, which covers our country with a Steel Dome for the peace and prosperity of our nation. From where to where? (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) From a Türkiye that was limited to 10 super Cobra helicopters in the fight against terrorism, today we have come to hundreds of ATAK helicopters produced and exported by TAI. From Vecihi Hürkuş, who could not achieve his dreams of producing domestic aircraft and died with his salary confiscated, to the hundreds of engineers who rushed to our KAAN plane today. Atatürk "The future is in the sky." He said, before we were just looking at the skies; Today we are looking at KAAN, HÜRJET GÖKBEY, AKINCI and KIZILELMA in the sky. We are experiencing a boom that will produce 1,450 aircraft, helicopters and UCAVs in ten years. From where to where? For years, they threatened not to give Patriots, they wanted to withdraw from our country and leave it defenseless; We are now building Europe's largest air defense facility on an area of ​​7 thousand acres.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - From where to where (!)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - Our SİHA and helicopter engines are complete, we are completing our tank and jet engines. We are scaring the fish with ROKETSAN (!) We are showing the stature and function of the Republic of Türkiye to the whole world with YILDIRIMHAN's 6 thousand kilometer range.

Here, from needy Türkiye to independent Türkiye;
From the accounted to the accounted Türkiye. Remember, once upon a time, they were drawing lines for us on maps, now we draw our lines and protect our borders from beyond. "Know your place, our answer will be harsh and clear." we say; from where to where!
Ataturk said, "Independence is my character." Today, we see that character on the wing of KAAN, in the shadow of Akıncı, on the deck of MİLGEM, on the radar of Çelik Kubbe, in the range of Yıldırımhan. We consider it a feat to write Atatürk not on raki glasses, but on missiles and satellites, and we respectfully salute the tall man with blue eyes, our President, Mr. Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, who continues the fight of the blue-eyed man against imperialism; We say God bless you. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - I am with these feelings.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - From where to where(!) From where to where(!)
MEHMET BAYKAN (Konya) - Come, come, come forward, come forward; It doesn't happen from there, we don't hear it!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - There is no need to be disturbed by this, there is no need to be disturbed by this; This should be applauded, we should be proud of it.
CHAIRMAN - Dear Member of Parliament, please address the General Assembly.
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - With these feelings, I wish our law to be beneficial, I wish the public employment rights of our contracted men to be beneficial, and I wish our nation and state to live long.
I greet you all with respect. ("Bravo" voices and applause from the AK PARTY rows; applause from the MHP rows)

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Pençe-Kilit Operasyonu kapsamında hain PKK-PYD'yle girdiği çatışmada yaralanan ve tedavi altına alındığı hastanede şehit düşen Uzman Çavuşumuz Alpay Aras'a Allah'tan rahmet, ailesine ve milletimize başsağlığı diliyor, terörü ve destekçilerini lanetliyorum. 2015'ten bu yana 37 bin teröristi imha eden kahraman Türk ordusuna başarılar diliyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

May God have mercy on our Specialist Sergeant Alpay Aras, who was injured in the conflict with the traitor PKK-PYD within the scope of the Claw-Lock Operation and was martyred in the hospital where he was treated, I offer my condolences to his family and our nation, and I curse terrorism and its supporters. I wish success to the heroic Turkish army, which has destroyed 37 thousand terrorists since 2015.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Ali Mahir Başarır ve avanesi direkt FETÖ taktiği uygulamaktadır Değerli Başkan.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Bu nasıl bir cümle ya, anlamıyorum ben.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - O ne biçim bir kelime ya; grubu, grubu!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - PKK elebaşını öven, bakın, PKK elebaşını öven rezil bir videoyu paylaşmamdan hareketle -kaldı ki benden önce birçok hesabın paylaştığı da ortadadır, burada gözükmektedir, birçok hesap paylaşmıştır- montaj yaptığımı, montaj yalanını piyasaya sürmüşlerdir; tam bir FETÖ taktiği uygulamışlardır. İftira at, izi kalsın mantığı gütmektedirler. Benden önce birçok hesaptan paylaşıldığını söyledim. PKK elebaşını öven kim varsa biz eleştiririz, her kim varsa yargının hesabı ayrıdır, bizim hesabımız ayrıdır. Herkes bayramda çocuklarına sarılırken bayramda evlatlarının mezarlarına sarılanlara karşı borcumuzdur bizim bu. Herkes Babalar Günü'nde babalarına sarılırken o şehitlerin yetimlerine karşı bizim borcumuzdur bu.

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Müsaade eder misiniz.

BAŞKAN - Buyurun.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

Dear President, Ali Mahir Basarir and his cronies are directly implementing FETO tactics.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - I don't understand what kind of a sentence this is.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (Izmir) - What kind of a word is that? group, group!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - See, based on my sharing a disgraceful video praising the PKK leader - and it is obvious that many accounts shared it before me, it appears here, many accounts shared it - they put the montage lie on the market; They implemented a complete FETO tactic. They follow the logic of slander and leave no trace. I said it was shared from many accounts before me. We criticize anyone who praises the PKK ringleader, the judiciary has a separate account of whoever, we have a separate account. While everyone hugs their children during the Eid, this is our duty to those who hug their children's graves during the Eid. While everyone hugs their fathers on Father's Day, this is our duty to the orphans of those martyrs.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Would you allow me?

CHAIRMAN - Here you go.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

İftirasının kanıtını doğrudan buradan paylaşıyorum. Benden önce paylaşan hesap: "Memleket Meselesi/ Fazla Atatürkçü" Buyurun. Ve kendisi söylüyor: "Sayın Çelebi doğru söylüyor, videoyu ilk ben paylaştım." Bunu bile bile yalan söylüyor, iftira atıyor.

Yalan söylüyorsun, iftira atıyorsun, FETÖ taktiği yapıyorsun. Anlaşıldı mı?

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Bak aynı şeyleri yapıyorsun.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Şimdi, FETÖ'cülere yandaşlık, Ahmet Altan, Nazlı Ilıcakları sahiplenen kim? Ali Tatar'ın ruhunu sızlatan sizsiniz be! "Kumpas davaları yeniden açacağız." diyen Babacan'la ortaklık yapan kim? Sizsiniz. Sadullah Ergin'i Ankara'dan, Yeneroğlu'nu İstanbul'dan, Taraf gazetesi yazarı Yüksel Taşkın'ı aday yapan kim? (AK PARTİ ve MHP sıralarından alkışlar)

Zaman gazetesi önünde FETÖ'cülere nöbet tutan kim? 2015'te Manisa'da, orada FETÖ'cüler için nöbet tutan kim? Kim bunlar? Bunların hesabını vereceksiniz. Darbeden dört ay önce "Zaman gazetesine kayyum atanmasın." diyen kim?

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

I am sharing the evidence of his slander directly here. The account that shared it before me: "Homeland Matters/ Too Ataturkist" Here you go. And he says it himself: "Mr. Çelebi is telling the truth, I shared the video first." Knowing this, he lies and slanders.

You lie, you slander, you engage in FETO tactics. Got it?

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Look, you are doing the same things.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Now, who is supporting FETO members and embracing Ahmet Altan and Nazlı Ilıcak? You are the one who made Ali Tatar's soul ache! "We will reopen conspiracy cases." Who is partnering with Babacan? It's you. Who nominated Sadullah Ergin from Ankara, Yeneroğlu from Istanbul, and Taraf newspaper writer Yüksel Taşkın as a candidate? (Applause from AK PARTY and MHP ranks)

Who is standing guard against FETO members in front of Zaman newspaper? Who was on guard for FETO members in Manisa in 2015? Who are they? You will pay for these. Four months before the coup, he said: "No trustee should be appointed to Zaman newspaper." Who said?

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

fields.Subject: CHP'nin 6 kez "evet" dediği tezkereye şimdi "hayır" dediğine ilişkin açıklaması

metadata.Konu: CHP'nin 6 kez "evet" dediği tezkereye şimdi "hayır" dediğine ilişkin açıklaması

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Ülkemiz 2013'te DEAŞ'ı terör örgütü kabul etmiş, 2014 Bakanlar Kurulu Kararı'yla tutumumuz vurgulanmıştır. Aynı yıl, 2014'te, Birleşmiş Milletler Güvenlik Konseyinin 2170 sayılı Kararı'yla DEAŞ'la mücadeleye yönelik uluslararası koalisyon kurulmuştur. Tezkeredeki yabancı asker konusu tamamıyla DEAŞ'la mücadele edecek koalisyonla ilgilidir. 2014 yılından itibaren çıkarılan bütün tezkerelerde aynı ifadeler yer almaktadır. CHP'nin 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 tezkere kararı doğru olarak "evet" olmuştur. 6 kez "evet" dediği aynı cümleye şimdi "hayır" demektedir. Tezkereye "hayır" demek terör devletine "evet" demektir, hain PKK-PYD'ye can simidi vermektir, göç dalgalarına yol vermektir, HDP'ye yağ çekmektir.

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - HDP'nin adını ağzına alma!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Biz Türkiye'nin birliğine, bütünlüğüne, kardeşliğine, güvenliğine karşı çevrilmiş binlerce tır silahın namlusuna gül takmayacağız. Demokrasiyi barış kisvesiyle o namluları okşayanlardan olmayacağız diyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Our country recognized DAESH as a terrorist organization in 2013, and our stance was emphasized with the 2014 Council of Ministers Decision. In the same year, 2014, the international coalition to fight against DAESH was established with the United Nations Security Council Resolution No. 2170. The issue of foreign soldiers in the memorandum is entirely related to the coalition that will fight against DAESH. All bills issued since 2014 contain the same statements. CHP's 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020 motion decision was correctly "yes". He now says "no" to the same sentence he said "yes" to 6 times. Saying "no" to the draft means "yes" to the terrorist state, giving a lifeline to the treacherous PKK-PYD, giving way to waves of migration, and flattering the HDP.

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Don't mention HDP's name!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - We will not put a rose in the barrel of thousands of trucks of guns turned against Türkiye's unity, integrity, brotherhood and security. I say that we will not be among those who caress those barrels under the guise of democracy and peace.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

8 Kasımda, Ermenistan'ın yirmi sekiz yıllık Karabağ işgali kırk dört günde son buldu, tarihî adalet yeniden tesis edildi. Atatürk "Azerbaycan'ın sevinci sevincimiz, kederi kederimiz." demiştir. Bu anlayışla, Türkiye, Azerbaycan'ı haklı davasında her zaman desteklemiş, Ermenistan'ı işgal ettiği topraklardan derhâl, koşulsuz geri çekilmeye çağırmış, sivillere yönelik saldırıları şiddetle kınamış ve kırk dört gün süren vatan muharebesi sırasında Azerbaycan'ın daima yanında yer almıştır. Bizler "Maalesef Azerbaycan'a yardım ettik." diyenlerden, selam vereceği yeri şaşıranlardan hiç olmadık.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

On November 8, Armenia's twenty-eight-year occupation of Karabakh ended in forty-four days, and historical justice was re-established. Ataturk said, "Azerbaijan's joy is our joy, its sorrow is our sorrow." he said. With this understanding, Turkey has always supported Azerbaijan in its rightful cause, called on Armenia to withdraw immediately and unconditionally from the occupied territories, strongly condemned attacks on civilians, and always stood by Azerbaijan during the forty-four-day war for the homeland. We said, "Unfortunately, we helped Azerbaijan." We have never been among those who were confused about where to greet.

records.title: Atatürk'e İlişkin açıklaması

fields.Subject: Atatürk'e İlişkin açıklaması

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Yirmi iki yılını cephede geçirmişliği, yorulmak bilmeden binlerce kitap okumuşluğu var. 42 yaşında devlet kurmuşluğu, "cumhuriyet" diyerek egemenliğe ait olduğu millete vermişliği var. En çaresiz durumda "Geldikleri gibi giderler. Ya istiklal ya ölüm!" demişliği, bayrağı indirmeyip ezanı dindirmeyişi, emperyalizme karşı mazlum milletlerin umudu oluşu var. Askerine "Ben size taarruzu değil, ölmeyi emrediyorum!" derken tek bir ağacı kesmemek için koca köşkü yürütmüşlüğü, "Yurtta barış, dünyada barış!" diyerek insanlığa yol gösterişi, eserini çok güvendiği gençliğe emanet etmişliği var. Ömrünü milletine adadığı gibi tüm malını mülkünü de milletine bağışlamışlığı... Hasretle, minnetle, saygıyla anıyor, Atatürk'ün izinde Türkiye Yüzyılı'nı selamlıyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

He has spent twenty-two years at the front and has tirelessly read thousands of books. He founded a state at the age of 42 and gave sovereignty to the nation to which he belonged, calling it a "republic". In the most desperate situation, "They will leave as they came. Either independence or death!" He has the courage to say things, he does not lower the flag and does not slow down the call to prayer, he is the hope of oppressed nations against imperialism. He told his soldiers, "I do not order you to attack, I order you to die!" Then he moved the whole mansion in order not to cut down a single tree, "Peace at home, peace in the world!" He showed the way to humanity by saying, and entrusted his work to the youth whom he trusted very much. Just as he devoted his life to his nation, he also donated all his property to his nation... I remember him with longing, gratitude and respect, and I salute the Turkish Century in the footsteps of Atatürk.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Kıbrıs Barış Harekâtı sonrasında 1975'te Kıbrıs Türk Federe Devleti kurulmuştur. 15 Kasım 1983'te Kıbrıs Türk Federe Devleti Meclisi, oy birliğiyle Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti'ni ilan etmiştir. Kuruluş bildirgesini kurucu Cumhurbaşkanı Rauf Denktaş okumuştur. Rauf Denktaş'ın dediği gibi, Kıbrıs Türk halkı Türk milletinin ayrılmaz, kopmaz bir parçasıdır. Bu anlayışla son dönemde, 8 Ekim 2020'de 1974'ten beri kapalı olan Maraş'ın bir kısmı halka açılmış, 11 Kasım 2022'de Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti'nin Türk Devletleri Teşkilatına gözlemci üye olarak kabul edilmesiyle tarihî bir karar alınmıştır. Kıbrıs'ta egemen eşitliğe dayalı bağımsız iki devlet çözümdür diyorum. Yavru vatanımız Kıbrıs'ın 40'ıncı yıl dönümünü kutluyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

Following the Cyprus Peace Operation, the Turkish Federated State of Cyprus was established in 1975. On 15 November 1983, the Assembly of the Turkish Federated State of Cyprus unanimously declared the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus. Founding President Rauf Denktaş read the founding declaration. As Rauf Denktaş said, the Turkish Cypriot people are an inseparable part of the Turkish nation. With this understanding, recently, on October 8, 2020, a part of Maraş, which has been closed since 1974, was opened to the public, and a historical decision was taken on November 11, 2022, when the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus was accepted as an observer member of the Organization of Turkish States. I say that two independent states based on sovereign equality is the solution in Cyprus. I congratulate the 40th anniversary of our baby homeland, Cyprus.

englishMetadata.Konu: Statement of the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus on the 40th anniversary of its establishment

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Şehit Teğmenimiz Sayın Ramazan Günay, şehit Uzman Çavuşumuz Sayın Mehmet Serinkan, şehit Uzman Onbaşımız Sayın İsmail Yazıcı, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Çağatay Erenoğlu, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Yasin Karaca, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Emre Taşkın, şehit Uzman Çavuşumuz Sayın Abdulkadir İyem, şehit Uzman Çavuşumuz Sayın Ahmet Arslan, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Cebrail Dündar, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Semih Yılmaz, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Kemal Aslan, şehit Sözleşmeli Erimiz Sayın Enis Budak; ruhları şad olsun. Teröre ve destekçilerine lanet olsun. Size kurşun sıkana, sıktırana, arkasında durana, selam verene bu dünyayı dar etmezsek namus bize ar olsun.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

Our martyr Lieutenant Mr. Ramazan Günay, our martyr Specialist Sergeant Mr. Mehmet Serinkan, our martyr Specialist Corporal Mr. İsmail Yazıcı, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Çağatay Erenoğlu, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Yasin Karaca, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Emre Taşkın, our martyr Specialist Sergeant Mr. Abdulkadir İyem, our martyr Specialist Sergeant Mr. Ahmet Arslan, Our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Cebrail Dündar, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Semih Yılmaz, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Kemal Aslan, our martyr Contracted Private Mr. Enis Budak; May their souls rest in peace. Damn terrorism and its supporters. May honor be upon us if we do not make this world a burden to those who shot you, those who made you shoot, those who stood behind you, those who saluted you.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Millî Savunma Komisyonu olarak Sayın Hulusi Akar Bakanımızın başkanlığında yavru vatanımız Kıbrıs'a ziyaret gerçekleştirdik. Kurucu Cumhurbaşkanı büyük lider Rauf Denktaş'ı ve Doktor Fazıl Küçük'ü anıt mezarlarını ziyaret ederek andık. Cumhurbaşkanı Sayın Ersin Tatar, Meclis Başkanı Sayın Zorlu Töre, Başbakan Sayın Ünal Üstel, Dışişleri Bakanı Sayın Tahsin Ertuğruloğlu, Cumhuriyet Meclisi Genel Kurulu, Hukuk, Siyasi İşler, Dış İlişkiler Komitesi Başkanı Sayın Yasemi Öztürk ve Komite üyeleri ve Kıbrıs Türk Barış Kuvvetleri karargâhını ziyaret ettik, hepsinin yürekten selamlarını size getirdik. 6 Şubat depremlerinin yıl dönümünde, Adıyaman İsias Otel'de kaybettiğimiz voleybolcu şampiyon meleklerimizi törenlerle andık. Büyükelçimiz Sayın Metin Feyzioğlu ve Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti'nden tüm kardeşlerimize konukseverlikleri için teşekkür ediyoruz.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

As the National Defense Commission, we visited our daughter country, Cyprus, under the chairmanship of our Minister Hulusi Akar. We commemorated the founding President, the great leader Rauf Denktaş and Doctor Fazıl Küçük by visiting their mausoleums. We visited the President of the Republic, Mr. Ersin Tatar, the Speaker of the Parliament, Mr. Zorlu Töre, the Prime Minister, Mr. Ünal Üstel, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, Mr. Tahsin Ertuğruloğlu, the Chairman of the General Assembly of the Assembly of the Republic, the Law, Political Affairs, Foreign Relations Committee, Mr. Yasemi Öztürk, and the members of the Committee and the headquarters of the Turkish Cypriot Peace Forces, and brought you their heartfelt greetings. On the anniversary of the February 6 earthquakes, we commemorated our lost volleyball champion angels with ceremonies at Adıyaman İsias Hotel. We would like to thank our Ambassador Mr. Metin Feyzioğlu and all our brothers from the Turkish Republic of Cyprus for their hospitality.

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler.

Öncelikle Sayın Başkan, biraz önce bence Meclis tarihine geçtiniz, on beş saniyelik söz hakkı vererek. Bunu ben yorgunluğunuza vermek istiyorum.

Bir dakikada da burada bir şey ifade edebileceğimi değerlendirmiyorum. Grubum bana zaten ileriki dönemde mutlaka madde üzerinde konuşma hakkı verecektir.

Ben şunu söylemek istiyorum tek cümleyle: Nerede ne kadar FETÖ'cü, PKK'lı terörist varsa nokta nokta. Gerisini halk doldursun.
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you.

First of all, Mr. President, I think you have just made history in the Parliament by giving me the right to speak for fifteen seconds. I want to give this to your tiredness.

I don't think I can express anything here in a minute. My group will definitely give me the right to speak on the matter in the future.

I want to say this in one sentence: Wherever there are FETO and PKK terrorists, dot by dot. Let the public fill in the rest.

fields.Subject: Yaptığı açıklaması sırasında kullandığı "nokta nokta" ifadesine ilişkin açıklaması

metadata.Konu: Yaptığı açıklaması sırasında kullandığı "nokta nokta" ifadesine ilişkin açıklaması

records.originalTurkish:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Yani FETÖ'cü, PKK'lı teröristlerle ilgili olan bir ifadeyle ilgili açıklama talep edildi bu yüce Mecliste, bu da ilginç geldi bana.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - Hayır, "nokta nokta"yı soruyoruz, çarpıtmayın.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Şöyle tamamlayalım: FETÖ'cü, PKK'lı ne kadar...

BAŞKAN - Sayın Çelebi, lütfen konuyu çarpıtmayalım. Mecliste temiz bir dil kullanmak esastır.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - Evet. "Nokta nokta"yı açıklayın!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - "Nokta nokta" diyemez miyim, "nokta nokta" yasak mı?

BAŞKAN - Siz "nokta nokta" diyerek neyi ifade ettiğinizi açıklamanızı istiyoruz sadece.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - "Nokta nokta"yı halk doldursun demem bence gayet normal.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - "Nokta nokta" temiz bir dil mi?

YAHYA ÇELİK (İstanbul) - "Soytarı" temiz bir dil mi?

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - O ne biçim bir laf ya, sen kime "soytarı" diyorsun? Hayır, biz kimseye söylemiyoruz öyle bir laf. Sen o "soytarı"yı nereden çıkardın, kim sana dedi öyle bir şey, nereden çıkardın?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Nerede ne kadar FETÖ'cü, PKK'lı terörist varsa lanet olsun, soyları kurusun; gerisini de halk doldursun!
records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Thank you, Mr. President.

In other words, an explanation was requested in this Supreme Parliament regarding a statement regarding FETO and PKK terrorists, and this seemed interesting to me.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (Izmir) - No, we are asking about "point by point", do not distort it.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Let's finish with this: How much are FETO members and PKK members...

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Çelebi, please let us not distort the issue. It is essential to use clear language in the parliament.

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (İzmir) - Yes. Explain "dot by dot"!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Can't I say "dot dot"? Is "dot dot" prohibited?

CHAIRMAN - We just want you to explain what you mean by saying "point by point".

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - I think it is quite normal for me to say that the public should fill in the "dot by dot".

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (Izmir) - Is "dot by dot" a clean language?

YAHYA ÇELİK (Istanbul) - Is "Jester" a clean language?

SEVDA ERDAN KILIÇ (Izmir) - What kind of a word is that, who are you calling "clown"? No, we do not tell anyone such a thing. Where did you come up with that "clown"? Who said such a thing to you? Where did you get it from?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Damn all the FETO and PKK terrorists wherever they are, may they be extinct; Let the public fill in the rest!

records.originalTurkish:
AK PARTİ GRUBU ADINA MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.

Türk Silahlı Kuvvetlerimiz bugün 3 kıtada 10'dan fazla ülkede görevini başarıyla yapıyor, düşmanlara geçmişte olduğu gibi güzel yetenekler kazandırıyor. Nasıl ki Yunan'a Kurtuluş Savaşı'nda yüzme yeteneği kazandırdık, yüzerek kaçtılar; hain teröristlere de millî roketlerimizle uçma yeteneği, ATAK'larımızla hızlı tünel kazma yeteneği, SİHA'larımızla saklambaç yeteneği kazandırmaya devam ediyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Savunma sanayimizde yerli ve millî 250 ürünümüzü 170 ülkeye ihraç ediyoruz. "Kurşun adres sormaz ki." derdik, o eskidendi; artık, roketlerimizin gideceği yerin adresini roket havadayken değiştirebiliyoruz.

Uçak motoru... Artık, devletimiz hangi motoru, hangi büyüklükte ve neresi için isterse yapabiliyoruz. Ürettiğimiz radarlardaki bir çip saniyede 20 DVD büyüklüğünde veri işleyebiliyor.

SİHA'larda dünya 1'incisiyiz. Azerbaycan fatihi TB2 yedi yüz bin saat uçuşu doldurdu, 32 ülke tarafından kullanılıyor. ALTAY tankımızda dünyada sadece 2 ülkede olan AKKOR Aktif Koruma Sistemi var. Kanada bize elektro optik kamera vermedi, şimdi biz dünyanın en iyisini yaptık; 80 kilometreden bir tankı görüntüleyip 20 kilometreden lazer işaretleme yapabiliyoruz. Bu arada, aramızda kalsın, o fabrika da iflas etti. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Kim yapıyor bunları? Şirketlerdeki yaş ortalaması 32-33 olan kardeşlerimiz, hepsine selam olsun. Çocuklar, fedakârlığınızı biliyoruz; sizin alınlarınızdan, şehit analarının ellerinden öpüyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Bizim öpeceğimiz el bellidir ve duruşumuz nettir. Biz Genel Merkezimizde bayrak kaldırmıyoruz, Afrin'e bayrak dikiyoruz. HDP barajı geçince sevinçten zıplamıyoruz, Yunan mavi vatanda rahat durmayınca onun üzerine zıplıyoruz.

YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Süleyman Şah Türbesi'ni kaldırıyorsunuz!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - "Dokunacağız." demiyoruz "Savunma sanayimizi uçuracağız." diyoruz ve yerlilik oranımızı yüzde 20'den yüzde 80'e çıkarıyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) Biz bedava traktör dağıtmıyoruz, hain teröristlere bedava roket dağıtıyoruz. Ajanları, PKK ve Öcalanseverleri savunmuyoruz; hainlerin dağlarda musallat oldukları o 12-13 yaşındaki Kürt kızlarımızı savunuyoruz ve "Kürtlerin devleti yoktur." demiyoruz "Kürtlerin devleti vardır, Türkiye Cumhuriyeti'dir." diyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

Biz en zor zamanlarda "Ekrem tatile çıksın!" demiyoruz, "Ayşe tatile çıksın!" anlayışını benimsiyoruz ve bu sayede elli yıllık FETÖ'yü devletten temizliyoruz, kırk yıllık PKK'yı ülkeden temizliyoruz, kırk altı yıldır kapalı olan Maraş'ı açıyoruz, otuz yıldır işgal altındaki Karabağ'ı kurtarıyoruz, Türk Devletleri Teşkilatını kuruyoruz. Biz Demirtaş'a selam çakıp şehitlerimizin ruhunu sızlatmıyoruz! (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Demirtaş'ın adını ağzına alma!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - 2015'ten beri yaptığımız operasyonlarla...

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Sen Demirtaş'ın ağzına...

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Alma ağzına, alma be!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - Demirtaş'a selam çakıp şehitlerimizin ruhunu sızlatmıyoruz!

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Terbiyeli ol, terbiyeli!

KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - Partini sattın, partini!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Oynak adamsın sen ya, seni ciddiye alan mı var be!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - 2015'ten beri yaptığımız operasyonlarla 39 bin teröristi çukurlara gömüp şehitlerimizin intikamını alıyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

MAHMUT DİNDAR (Van) - Sen daha önce neler söylüyordun, neler söylüyordun!

KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - Sen önce partini sattın, partini! Hangi yüzle konuşuyorsun!

BAŞKAN - Evet, değerli milletvekilleri...

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Devamla) - Bu operasyonları başarıyla yapan Sayın Hulusi Akar Bakanımızı tebrik ediyoruz ve Yaşar Güler Bakanımıza da başarılar diliyoruz. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Sayın Başkan, bu, Demirtaş'ın tırnağı olamaz!

records.englishTranslation:
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP - Thank you, Mr. President.

Today, our Turkish Armed Forces are successfully performing their duties in more than 10 countries on 3 continents, providing enemies with good capabilities as in the past. Just as we gave the Greeks the ability to swim during the War of Independence, they escaped by swimming; We continue to provide traitor terrorists with the ability to fly with our national rockets, the ability to dig tunnels quickly with our ATAKs, and the ability to hide and seek with our UCAVs. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) We export 250 of our domestic and national products in our defense industry to 170 countries. "A bullet doesn't ask for an address." We used to say, that was in the past; We can now change the destination address of our rockets while the rocket is in the air.

Aircraft engine... Now, we can produce whatever engine our state wants, in whatever size and for wherever. A chip in the radars we produce can process data the size of 20 DVDs per second.

We are the 1st in the world in UCAVs. The conqueror of Azerbaijan, TB2, has completed seven hundred thousand flight hours and is used by 32 countries. Our ALTAY tank has the AKKOR Active Protection System, which is available in only 2 countries in the world. Canada didn't give us an electro-optical camera, now we've made it the best in the world; We can view a tank from 80 kilometers and laser mark it from 20 kilometers. By the way, between us, that factory also went bankrupt. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks) Who is doing these? Greetings to all of our brothers and sisters whose average age in companies is 32-33. Children, we know your sacrifice; We kiss your foreheads and the hands of the mothers of the martyrs. (Applause from the AK PARTY ranks) The hand we will kiss is clear and our stance is clear. We do not raise the flag at our Headquarters, we plant the flag in Afrin. We don't jump for joy when HDP passes the threshold, we jump for it when the Greek blue homeland doesn't stay comfortable.

YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - You are removing the Tomb of Süleyman Shah!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - "We will touch." We do not say, "We will blow up our defense industry." and we are increasing our localization rate from 20 percent to 80 percent. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) We do not distribute free tractors, we distribute free rockets to treacherous terrorists. We do not defend agents, PKK and Öcalan lovers; We defend our 12-13 year old Kurdish girls who are haunted by traitors in the mountains and say "Kurds have no state." We do not say "Kurds have a state, it is the Republic of Türkiye." we say. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

In the most difficult times, we say "Ekrem should go on vacation!" We don't say, "Ayşe should go on vacation!" We adopt the concept of FETO and in this way, we are clearing the fifty-year-old FETO from the state, we are clearing the forty-year-old PKK from the country, we are opening Maraş, which has been closed for forty-six years, we are saving Karabakh, which has been occupied for thirty years, and we are establishing the Organization of Turkish States. We do not salute Demirtaş and grieve the souls of our martyrs! (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Don't mention Demirtaş's name!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - With the operations we have carried out since 2015...

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You put it in Demirtaş's mouth...

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Don't put it in your mouth, don't take it!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We do not grieve the souls of our martyrs by saluting Demirtaş!

MERAL DANIŞ BEŞTAŞ (Erzurum) - Be well-mannered, well-behaved!

KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - You sold your party, your party!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You are a playful man, does anyone take you seriously!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - With the operations we have carried out since 2015, we have buried 39 thousand terrorists in pits and avenged our martyrs. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

MAHMUT DİNDAR (Van) - What were you saying before, what were you saying!

KAMURAN TANHAN (Mardin) - You sold your party first, your party! With what face are you talking!

CHAIRMAN - Yes, dear MPs...

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We congratulate our Minister Hulusi Akar for successfully carrying out these operations and we wish success to our Minister Yaşar Güler. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Mr. President, this cannot be Demirtaş's fingernail!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - "The defense budget is high." Those who say, my promise to you is this: You will sing the National Anthem first!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You are a fickle man! You can't mention Demirtaş! You are a rude man!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - You will not seek a homeland within a homeland by saying "autonomy"!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You are a rude man!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Send your own children to Europe, America; You will not send the children of this nation to the mountains! (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Who are you; You were here yesterday, you are a crazy man!

CHAIRMAN - Dear MPs...

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - You will not be like a cat while taking the oath of parliament and you will not be like a lion while taking the separatist oath!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You were here yesterday, you were swearing at them; You're swearing here and there today! Bad manners man!

MAHMUT DİNDAR (Van) - How much money did you get?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - And you will not eat the bread of this nation and call this nation "genocidal"!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - There is nothing you cannot sell for a mandate!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - You will go through these stages first. And you will not shamelessly slander the Turkish Armed Forces about chemical weapons.

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You are an empty (...)(*) man! You are a useless man!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - We are here, we will not let you lose the rights of Mehmetçik!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You were here yesterday, you are here today! Nasty man! Digging! Ill mannered!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not give you credit for our lieutenant Eril Alperen Emir, who was martyred just yesterday.

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Just go to work! Mind your own business! Nasty man!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not let you pay the justice of Major Arslan Kulaksız, who was martyred in front of his daughter and wife!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Nasty man! You are rude!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - "Father, if I become a martyr, you will destroy Afyon, let's get you a tranquilizer pill..."

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Go away, you dirty man!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - Having said that, we will not give you the credit of our martyred Specialist Sergeant Kerim Member.

MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - Control your nerves!

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Oh, who are you, who are you, who are you?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - He said to his father, who was an imam, "Father, lead my prayer." We will not give you the credit of our martyr Muhammet Fatih Durhan, who said:

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - You are a man who sold your party and left! Dirty!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Eat everything yourself!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not give you credit for our maroon beret that does not fit in the coffin, our Specialist Sergeant Selçuk Paker.

MAHMUT DİNDAR (Van) - Tell me how much you were sold for, how much were you sold for?

MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - Is it up to you to defend the PKK, or is it up to you to defend the PKK?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not give you the justice of Aybüke Yalçın and the 149 murdered teachers. ("Bravo" sounds and applause from the AK PARTY rows; noises from the HEDEP rows)

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Oh, go, go, for God's sake!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Our 40 thousand martyrs, 70 thousand veterans; We will not give you the credit for any of them.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You sold your own cause, your own cause! You are a person who sold his cause to a bunch of people.

MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - Are you a lover of terrorism? Shut up!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Çelebi, please complete.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - You cannot defeat this spirit that announces a will in advance in your 20s. That's why our salute is to them, not to the separatists; Greetings to the heroic Turkish army.

SIRRI SAKİK (Ağrı) - Oh, who are you? You're such a rude person!

MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - No one is criticizing you, we are talking about PKK.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - There is no one who wants your greetings, we do not want the greetings of the sold people!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Greetings to the Century of Türkiye, in the footsteps of Atatürk and under the leadership of our President Erdoğan. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - We do not want the greetings of those who sell their own cause! You are the traitor.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Greetings and hope to Gaza, Baku, Kirkuk, Bosnia and all the oppressed.

I ask our Minister of Transport: When will the Ankara-İzmir High Speed ​​​​Railway Project be completed? Can you give a date? What is the latest status of the Çubuk tunnel, which Burdur and Antalya are waiting for?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (İzmir) ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP - Thank you, Mr. President.
I respectfully salute the Supreme Assembly.
First of all, I would like to commemorate Lieutenant Colonel Ali Tatar with respect and mercy on the 16th anniversary of his walk to God. (Noise from CHP benches)
ULAŞ KARASU (Sivas) - Leave it alone, don't put it in your mouth!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Oh, don't mention him!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Don't put it in your mouth!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Don't put it in your mouth! Don't put it in your mouth!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are with their murderers! You are with his murderers, his murderers!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - I state with determination that we will never be among those who give hope to FETO like you, we will continue to penetrate their lairs. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Don't put it in your mouth!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Shame, shame! You will not mention Ali Tatar's name!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shameless, shameless!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - If there is any shame, you are the last person to remember! The last person to remember is you!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Dear MPs, I will not tell you history today because we are history. The fate of this nation breathes with us. Today, we are not alone under this blessed roof. We feel those invisible armies that march with us, wearing the courage of Sultan Alparslan, the might of Mehmet the Conqueror, and the steel will of Atatürk. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Wow!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Those armies that fell like torches against the pitch darkness of terrorism in our forty-year struggle, we will not forget.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are with those who conspired against the national army! You are with Ali Tatar's murderers and collaborators!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not forget that our children, who are 1.90 tall, stepped on a mine and became shorter than us.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You made Ali Tatar's bones ache!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) -
He showed the photo of his martyred father and said, "Don't let the pin prick my father." We will not forget little Alya. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - You are with the collaborators of those who murdered Ali Tatar, shameless!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We will not forget Major Murat Kemal Yetişen, who was martyred on his wedding anniversary and buried on his daughter's birthday. Our 21-year-old petty officer, Yusuf Ataş.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shameless! Shameless!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Shame, shame, shame!
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - He will be ashamed for the rest of his life.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Is that why you went to İmralı, what are you talking about! Is that why you went to İmralı? If you care about so many martyrs, why did you go to İmralı? (Noise from AK PARTY benches)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - Don't raise your voice!
Yusuf Ataş's "If I become a martyr, send a girl with leukemia to school." We will not forget his will. We burned with our martyrs, we were left incomplete with our veterans, and we considered their trusts as the crown of our hearts. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) We will never forget these glorious victories, we will always remember them with pride; May God be pleased with them and may their souls rest in peace.
Here we are, the children of a noble nation that considers death as a duty when necessary; we don't finish.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You are finished, you don't realize it.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - The Turkish nation is never finished, but you are!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Atatürk's words in Çanakkale: "I order you not to attack, but to die. New forces will take our place in the time that passes until we die." The spirit that rises when he says is now right next to us; We are the heirs of an inexhaustible, invincible will that always replaces us with new ones. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
In the same spirit, today, when our Commander-in-Chief Recep Tayyip Erdoğan orders, the heroic Turkish army is waiting for his orders to die on the target whenever and wherever he wants. (Applause from the AK PARTY benches, noise from the CHP benches)
VELI AĞBABA (Malatya) - You, you, you, you, you, you, you are a loser! May God not make anyone a deputy like you. Fond!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We are always ready to become martyrs, but what history and the future want from us today is not to die like on the front lines. Today, the real front is inside, in unity, in brotherhood.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Shame on you!
ALI KARAOBA (Uşak) - Oh, you have no shame!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Your face doesn't turn red either!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - There is one commander-in-chief. You didn't stop saying anything until you got there, is this what happened when you got there?
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Today, the real front is not behind the mountains but in the divided hearts right in the middle of our minds. Today, the real front is in science and production. What those who shed blood for the flag and the country want from us today is to shed sweat. What is required from us today is to solve our problems and strengthen our internal front, not with weapons but with words, not with anger but with wisdom.
Our lions did not return. Let us never turn back from this cause of brotherhood. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
As politicians responsible to our nation, we will not be deceived and will not give up being united. "They should not leave their weapons behind." We will not be deceived by the fake leftists who sigh and the hormonal pot nationalists who feed on the problem. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
HASAN TOKTAŞ (Bursa) - Come on, you rude person! Immoral!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shameless!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Because we know that it is not leftism to sympathize with the treacherous terrorist organization while they were massacring our children yesterday.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Look in the mirror, in the mirror!
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shameless, fond! Shameless, fond!
LEYLA ŞAHİN MASTER (Ankara) - Dear Veli Ağbaba, do not insult!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - It's not an insult.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Shameless, fond!
LEYLA ŞAHİN MASTER (Ankara) - "Shameless, fond" is not an insult, is it?
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Not to him, not to him.
LEYLA ŞAHİN MASTER (Ankara) - Please, don't do it!
(Exchange of words between AK PARTY and CHP ranks)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - .To spoil the game while abolishing them today is not leftism. Just as it was not nationalism to surrender to the mentality imposed by terrorism while having a gun in hand yesterday, it is not nationalism to resist while having a gun laid down today; You can't make this happen.
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - Come on! Ill mannered!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - So, what is nationalism?

Let's pay attention to the names, they are all from Turkish mythology, they are all symbols of Turkish nationalism; Our national KIZILELMA unmanned war plane saw it with our national MURAD radar and hit it with our national GÖKDAĞON missile; That's what nationalism is. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Your comrades are ashamed of you, they are ashamed!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - To keep the symbols of Turkishness alive with these achievements.
RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - Your soldier friends are ashamed of you, they are ashamed!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Nationalism is "This is the slogan" for the blue homeland. It is not about building 34 warships at the same time, which cannot be seen anywhere else in the world.
Look, dear MPs, Ataturk, the greatest nationalist.
ALIYE TEAM ERSEVER (Ankara) - Don't mention Ataturk!
FATMA ÖNCÜ (Erzurum) - Listen! Listen!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - In the War of Independence, he first united the hearts, then established the law of brotherhood and defeated the enemy. The following answer he received from a villager when his car broke down while going to Samsun and passing to Havza is ingrained in our hearts: "My homeland is the border of this field, if the enemy comes there, I will fight." said that villager. Don't worry, our field also has its limits. This country has a soul; flag, homeland, Ataturk, adhan. We cannot establish a law of brotherhood with those who look sideways at these four. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Is that why you missed the Tomb of Suleyman Shah?
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Unless one of these happens, we cannot hold on to these lands and we need to focus on our President, Mr. Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, rather than ourselves on these issues.
We trust and believe in Mr. Devlet Bahçeli. Even if we fall down on this path, we will fall down prostrating ourselves towards the Kaaba. (Applause from AK PARTY and MHP ranks)
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - What a shame for you; Don't applaud this.
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - We are a strong country, let's know who we are; We have the largest dormitory-student network in the world, we are one of the 3 countries with the largest representation network in the world, we have 2 of the most comprehensive digital public systems in the world with e-government and UYAP, and we are 4th in the world in attracting tourists.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - I swear, no tourist will come to see you, I swear they won't!
(Exchange of words between AK PARTY and CHP ranks)
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - We have an unprecedented record in the post-disaster housing production rate, we have the world's 4th largest exploration fleet in energy, we are the largest agricultural economy in Europe; These describe a powerful country, the Republic of Türkiye; Let's be proud.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - If they are so strong, why is this nation miserable? What are you talking about!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Dear MPs, 16 Turkish states were destroyed, we always boasted of establishing a new one. No, dear representatives, no; Today, we will be proud of not dividing the Republic of Türkiye and of expanding the borders of our heartland; this is the time.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - We will say that this republic is the republic of the right and the left, the many and the few. This supreme Parliament is the home of Alevis, Sunnis, Turks, Kurds and Zazas.

Even though our name is different, our surname is the Republic of Türkiye. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
The 2 trillion dollars spent on terrorism is a future where every penny has been stolen from us. With this 2 trillion dollars, we could have all of the things I will list now: 5 giant nuclear power plants, each the size of Akkuyu, an additional 20 thousand kilometers of high-speed train line, new metro networks in 15 metropolitan cities, and the renewal of the entire smart highway network.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Who ruled for twenty-three years, who? When did terrorism end? Were you lying then?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continue) - .20 A world-class university on par with MIT; 50 artificial intelligence, biotechnology, nanotechnology, defense technologies research institutes, 3 national space bases, 2 domestic satellite launch centers, renovation of all schools; Renewal of Türkiye's sewage, drinking water, rain water and earthquake strengthening infrastructure.
REŞAT KARAGÖZ (Amasya) - First, come as a native of Amasya and walk around the streets of Amasya; Go to a village, do they accept you or not? Then talk about halalness.
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - .2 million social housing, 10 semiconductor chip factories at Samsung level, 50 ultra-modern city hospitals, 1,000 full-fledged elderly care centers.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - This mouth is the PKK mouth! This mouth is the mouth of division!
CHAIRMAN - Why are you shouting, brother, why are you shouting? Don't shout, don't shout, brother.
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - smart irrigation and agricultural technologies, 5 mega
technology city and 500 KAAN; We could have it all. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - If necessary, the state will fight, and if necessary, the state will spend money and budget to avoid division.
CHAIRMAN - Don't shout, don't shout, brother!
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - You are the last person to tell these, the last one! You are the last person to talk about these!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - With this understanding, the Kurds say, "Our state is only one, and that is the Republic of Türkiye." They are united in their understanding. Kurds are honorable citizens of this country, Kurds belong to strong Türkiye; They will never contribute to a structure that contradicts their essence. (Sounds of "Bravo" from the AK PARTY ranks, applause) Kurds are part of the great Türkiye, they will not be the buttress of the great Israel. And to the enemies of humanity who are planning surgery in our region, do not forget our iron fist in velvet gloves, because one day you will face a real army. That day you will realize that war is not about killing innocent babies in arms. When you meet the maroon beret and the blue beret, you will understand very well what honor, bravery and military service are.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - You will tell the one who killed; You will tell Apo, you will tell PKK, you will tell Apo supporters!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - As Turkey, we have no eyes on anyone's land, but what history proudly shouts is this: "If the shadow of the oppressors lengthens, the sun sets." It means.
YÜKSEL SELÇUK TÜRKOĞLU (Bursa) - Who killed the babies! Who killed the babies! You won't go arm in arm with him!
MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - If Türkiye is with you, know that the sun is now rising from our glorious history.

I salute the Supreme Assembly with respect and pride. ("Bravo" voices and applause from the AK PARTY rows; applause from the MHP rows)

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - You are trying to justify yourself through someone else's crime.

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continuing) - Calling Atatürk "Racist." Why don't you object? Atatürk was called "Racist." says, "Dersim massacre." he says, there is no sound.

BURCU KÖKSAL (Afyonkarahisar) - Nobody in this party insulted Atatürk. Don't confuse yourself! No one in this party insulted Atatürk. Don't confuse yourself! Don't confuse yourself!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - Look, in that speech I made my criticisms about the cases, but for me the most important thing is the state, my cause is bigger than me. For me, what matters is the state. (Applause from AK PARTY and MHP ranks)

SİBEL SUİÇMEZ (Trabzon) - What a case!

BURCU KÖKSAL (Afyonkarahisar) - What a case! Yours is a money case!

HAKKI SARUHAN OLUÇ (Antalya) - This is your case, this is it! This is your case! Of course, while you were going there, your case multiplied on its own!

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - I said, "Erdoğan should go so that FETO and PKK can collapse on the state." I am not so immoral and stateless as to say: That's why I didn't support this toxic equation.

SİBEL SUİÇMEZ (Trabzon) - Get over this, get over it!

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - What did you pay for leaving? What did you leave for?

MEHMET ALİ ÇELEBİ (Continued) - I fully support the People's Alliance and our President. You are talking about Kemalism, we are doing it.
